title: Soft-ToggleSneak
description: Soft ToggleSneak is a simple Mod that gives additional functionality to ToggleSneaking.
body:
Soft ToggleSneak is a simple Mod that gives additional functionality to ToggleSneaking.

If you Sneak for a specific amount of ticks, it will activate ToggleSneak.  
By default the bounds are 0-5 ticks, a.k.a. 0-0.25 seconds.  
If sneak is held for longer or shorter, it will act as a normal sneak.  
It's possible to change upper and lower bounds in config.  
 

### TODOs:
- Downgrade to lower Minecraft and Java versions

### Mods needed to use this Mod:
 - [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

### Suggested Mods to use this Mod:
 - [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
 - [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)

### Original Concept:

- [Zebra's ToggleSneak](https://shotbow.net/forum/threads/zebras-togglesneak-for-minecraft-1-8-1-10-2.342553/)
